# Zoran Krstić – Frontend Developer

## About
Zoran Krstić is a frontend developer specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript, passionate about building clean, performant, and user-friendly web applications.
Available for freelance projects and full-time positions.

## Website
https://zkrstic.dev

## Contact
- Email: contact@zkrstic.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/krsticzoran
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zorankrstic/

## Tech Stack
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Nuxt 3, Vue, GraphQL, Express.js, MongoDB, Strapi, WordPress (Headless), Vercel, Netlify

## Services
- Web application development (React, Next.js, Nuxt 3)
- Landing pages and portfolio websites
- UI/UX implementation (Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion)
- Figma to HTML/CSS/JS conversion
- Headless CMS integration (WordPress, Strapi)
- Performance optimization and SEO

## Selected Projects

### Client Projects
- **Lypta** – SaaS marketing site (Nuxt 3, Tailwind CSS, Markdown Blog) – https://lypta-website.vercel.app/
- **Portage Creek Web Designs** – Portfolio websites (Next.js, Tailwind CSS) – https://portagecreekwebdesigns.com/
- **Fakturify** – SaaS invoicing marketing site (Nuxt 3, Tailwind CSS) – https://www.fakturify.com/
- **Learn Plus NGO** – NGO website (Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi) – https://learn-plus.org/
- **Infiniwave** – Designer portfolio landing page (Figma to HTML/CSS/JS) – https://infiniwave.be/
- **Basketball Coach** – Portfolio site for NBA coach Siniša Savović (Next.js, SASS, Resend) – https://probasketballcoach.com/
- **Rollo** – PVC joinery website with SEO (WordPress, Elementor) – https://rollo.hr/

### Personal Projects
- **Tea Shop** – E-commerce site (Next.js, WordPress Headless CMS) – https://e-store.zkrstic.com/
- **Real Estate Agency** – Full-stack platform (React, TypeScript, GraphQL, Express.js, MongoDB) – https://real.estate.zkrstic.com/
- **AI Buddy** – Voice-enabled ChatGPT interface (React, Redux Toolkit, Firebase) – https://ai-buddy.netlify.app/

## Performance
Achieves 90+ on Google PageSpeed Insights (mobile) and 97+ on desktop.
